name: Pop the Cork Pasta Crunch
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the macaroni according to package directions, then drain.
2. Rinse with cold water and drain again.
3. Pat the moisture from the macaroni with paper towels.
4. In a small bowl, combine the cheese, Italian seasoning, and garlic salt. Set aside.
5. Heat oil in a deep skillet or fryer to 365°F (185°C).
6. Fry 12 pieces of macaroni at a time in the hot oil until light brown, about 1 to 1 1/2 minutes.
7. Stir to separate the pieces and remove with a slotted spoon from the oil onto paper towels.
8. Repeat steps 5-7 until all the cooked macaroni is fried.
9. While the macaroni are still warm, sprinkle with the cheese mixture.
10. Gently toss to coat evenly and let cool. Makes about 10 servings.
